svg.text: Azure Incident Resolver - Complete System Architecture
DB Spike • Memory Leak • API Rate Limit • Failed Deploy
Disk Space • SSL Expiry • CPU Spike • Deadlock
Cache Down • Slow Query • Feature Bug
Sensitive data masking • No hardcoded secrets • Azure CLI auth
• Real-time Azure Monitor queries (60-second interval polling)
• Statistical anomaly detection (2σ thresholds + trend analysis)
• 11 incident patterns: DB, Memory, CPU, Disk, SSL, API, Cache, Deadlock, Deploy, Query, Feature
• Severity scoring (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM) • Creates incidents with full context
• GitHub Models AI (gpt-4o-mini) via azure-ai-inference SDK
• In-memory RAG system (last 20 incidents, cosine similarity scoring)
• Root cause analysis with 80%+ confidence threshold
• Evidence gathering from logs, metrics, and historical patterns
• Impact assessment (users affected, revenue impact, SLA breach risk)
• Fallback to rule-based diagnosis if AI unavailable
• Dual-fix strategy: Immediate remediation + Permanent code fix
• Real Azure SDK calls: azure-mgmt-sql, azure-mgmt-web, azure-mgmt-compute
• Database scaling (S1→S3), VM restart, Pod scaling, Cache flush, Disk cleanup
• GitHub Copilot Agent Mode for intelligent code generation
• Auto-creates GitHub PRs with PyGithub (labels: incident-auto-fix, automated)
• Sensitive data masking (API keys, passwords, PII redacted before external calls)
• Runtime context extraction for Copilot prompts (stack traces, configs, logs)
• Post-mortem auto-generation with complete incident timeline
• Incident knowledge base (in-memory storage for pattern matching)
• Lessons learned extraction and action items tracking
• Dashboard notifications via WebSocket for real-time updates
Semantic Kernel 1.4 • Azure Service Bus 7.12 • GitHub Models (gpt-4o-mini) • PyGithub 2.1 • Flask-SocketIO 5.3 • Azure SDKs (mgmt-sql, mgmt-web, mgmt-compute)
